title: Everyone is trying to build an AI trader, but I used AI in a different way.
author: powerade-trader
selftext:
https://preview.redd.it/u8rdue2k99pg1.png?width=3110&format=png&auto=webp&s=ce021232c06db861b4502c182f2be8dcab1633bd

  
Artificial intelligence has always served as an assistant. Even the biggest names in the AI field have said that it is an assistant and that using AI as an assistant is always much more productive.



In trading (excluding HFT and other specific concepts), the main reason we try to automate trades is that human psychology is prone to making wrong decisions.



And I’ve created an AI Assistant—a strategy tracking and recommendation assistant for those who use concepts like ICT, Price Action, and SMC while trading.

By talking to it, you can create strategies, refine your current strategy, or, when entering a trade, proceed step-by-step together to have it confirm the entry conditions for the strategy with you, thereby helping you avoid psychological errors.



I plan to develop this project for free. I’ll share updates as I develop it.

comments.author: Feisty-Career-6737
comments.body: I took the same approach.. i use AI to do a lot of my research and analysis and layout potential trading plans.  I collect tons of data from APIs and the web and format it and send it off to various LLM APIs to analyze based on my parameters.   It does what takes me hours in minutes.   I had to give up day trading for awhile because I just didnt have the time to devote to it to be successful.   AI has allowed me to trade again without sacrificing time I don't have.  Interested to track your progress.

comments.author: Maniacal-Maniac
comments.body:
Just started working on something similar, basically trying to recreate some of the features and tools I pay a subscription for.  That way I just end up with API and data costs.

A future phase of that will include strategy analysis, backtesting and possibly some AI assisted strategies.

Not a clue how it will turn out, but I figure it’s a fun way to try to learn about the capabilities of AI and vibe coding for something that I have an interest in.

comments.author: Competitive_Ship_167
comments.body: be interested to see how you get on

comments.author: Future-Display7807
comments.body: Also been working on something similar. I think it’s a smart idea. Curious how it goes !

comments.author: HmmmNotSure20
comments.body: How do I use the Q Alpha indicator? What time frames do you suggest?
